sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ الْقِطَارُ إِلَى الْمَحَطَّةِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Voz je stigao na stanicu ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: The train arrived at the station in the morning.

sentences.arabic: نَزَلَ الْمُسَافِرُونَ مِنَ الْقِطَارِ وَأَخَذُوا حَقَائِبَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Putnici su izašli iz voza i uzeli svoje torbe.
sentences.translationEn: The travelers got off the train and took their bags.

sentences.arabic: بَحَثَ أَحْمَدُ عَنْ سَيَّارَةِ الْأُجْرَةِ أَمَامَ الْمَحَطَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je tražio taksi ispred stanice.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed looked for a taxi in front of the station.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ بَعْدَ نِصْفِ سَاعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Stigao je do hotela nakon pola sata.
sentences.translationEn: He arrived at the hotel after half an hour.
